---
title: "vector_router.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/engine/vector_router.py"
loc: 14
complexity: 3
logic_score: 5.10
style_score: 3.75
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.77
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating VectorRouter, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import VectorRouter and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `VectorRouter`
- `__init__`
- `get_top_domain`
